# MCLUB — 百盛家族辦公室 (Baisheng Family Office)

> **環球財智·安家立業** — Global Financial Wisdom · Settle & Establish
> 您的跨境財富與家族事務管家 — Your Cross-Border Wealth & Family Affairs Steward

---

## 🏢 About MCLUB

MCLUB is a premier family office under **Park Zeman Chase Limited (百盛大通集團)**, providing comprehensive cross-border wealth management and family affairs services. With over 10 years of legal expertise and an extensive global network, MCLUB serves as the ultimate bridge connecting high-net-worth clients to world-class resources, investments, and lifestyle opportunities.

### Company Information

| Item | Details |
|------|---------|
| **Brand** | MCLUB / 百盛家族辦公室 |
| **Parent** | Park Zeman Chase Limited (百盛大通集團) |
| **Co-Founder** | Kenneth Mak |
| **Hotline** | +852 6227 7662 |
| **Website** | www.parkzeman.com |
| **HQ** | Room 1105, Lippo Centre Tower 2, Admiralty, HK |
| **Branch** | Concordia Plaza 1A, TST East, Kowloon, HK |

---

## 🔑 Three Core Pillars

| Pillar | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| **1. Legal Foundation** | 10+ years of legal expertise — M&A, IPOs, family trusts, compliance |
| **2. Cross-Border Resource Deployment** | Global network: China ↔ HK ↔ Japan ↔ Middle East |
| **3. Elite Club & Relationship Inheritance** | Top-tier networks, exclusive events, family perpetuity mechanisms |

---

## 📦 Product Lineup

### [Product 1: Core Business Overview](./docs/products/01-core-business.md)
The complete MCLUB ecosystem — legal foundation, cross-border resources, elite networking, wealth fortress architecture, CRS compliance, identity planning, and global leader network.

**Key Highlights:**
- 3,000 sq ft TST East flagship clubhouse
- Traffic engine: MyPath AI App → Amber Lodging → Wealth conversion
- Global network: Jim Rogers, Enrico Letta, 謝清海, and more
- Wealth fortress: Trust + Family Office golden structure
- CRS 2.0 & Golden Tax Phase IV compliance strategies

---

### [Product 2: Japan Property Investment](./docs/products/02-japan-property-investment.md)
Osaka real estate investment with guaranteed 6% annual rental yield, paired with Japanese residency/visa pathways.

**Key Highlights:**
- Osaka properties from JPY 6,050萬 (HKD ~300萬)
- 6% guaranteed rental yield (包租)
- 94.2% average occupancy rate
- Highly Skilled Work Visa → 1-year permanent residency
- Full purchase support (cash or loan options)

---

### [Product 3: Wealth Inheritance & Trust](./docs/products/03-wealth-inheritance-trust.md)
Hong Kong trust establishment, family office setup, and CRS-era asset planning strategies.

**Key Highlights:**
- Trust + Family Office golden structure
- Hong Kong: no estate tax, no capital gains tax
- HKD 4.5M minimum capital for trust company setup
- CRS compliance: tax identity, holding structure, filing strategies
- Step-by-step implementation roadmap

---

### [Product 4: NPC Fund (源石資本有限合夥基金)](./docs/products/04-npc-fund.md)
Network Power Capital Limited Partnership Fund — a dual-engine investment vehicle combining Japan hotel real estate with MyPath AI travel tech ecosystem.

**Key Highlights:**
- Fund size: USD 15M | Target return: 8%–35%
- O2O2O ecosystem: MyPath App ↔ Amber Lodging ↔ In-room E-commerce
- 8% guaranteed yield + ecosystem upside potential
- Osaka portfolio: Rita Hotel Namba (166 rooms) + 4 development sites
- ROI up to 25.35% with leverage
- SFC Type 1/4/9 licensed investment manager
- Strategic partners: MUFG, Mitsui, Sumitomo, Deloitte

---

### [Product 5: MyPath Japan AI Concierge](./docs/products/05-mypath-japan-ai-concierge.md)
The world's first AI-augmented travel concierge for Japan — combining AI precision with human concierge service, powered by a dual-layer AI brain and O2O2O ecosystem flywheel.

**Key Highlights:**
- Target: 15.7M Chinese-speaking Japan travelers (42.58% market share)
- Dual-layer AI: Gemini + Japan-exclusive deep travel database (K LINE AIR TRAVEL)
- Human-in-the-Loop: AI planning → User confirmation → K LINE expert fulfillment
- O2O2O closed loop: App → Amber Lodging → In-room e-commerce
- Apple App Store certified & launched (April 2026)
- Seed funded by NPC Fund (源石資本)

---

### [Product 6: Modular Success Blueprint (Side Business)](./docs/products/06-modular-success-blueprint.md)
Healthcare direct sales & modular membership ecosystem — three-tier plans combining men's health products with business services, legal consulting, and elite club access.

**Key Highlights:**
- Founder Calvin Chu: 25+ years in health tech, $13.9M industry record
- Core product: VFK Visceral Fat Killer (clinically proven -33% visceral fat, -11kg/3 months)
- Plan A (HK$4,800): Men's Health Pack (Battleman + Sea Cucumber)
- Plan B (HK$13,800): + Legal/Tax consulting + VIP business venues
- Plan C (HK$29,800): + Prestige club access (HK Golf Club, Mission Hills) + 24hr corporate training
- Self-reinforcing value perpetual motion machine

---

### [Product 7: Comprehensive Bonus Plan — Direct Sales 4-Level Scheme](./docs/products/07-comprehensive-bonus-plan.md)
4-level entry system for healthcare direct sales (Levels 1-3) and combined direct sales + MCLUB membership (Level 4), with 7 bonus types generating multiple income streams.

**Key Highlights:**
- Levels 1-3: Healthcare direct sales entry ($1,800–$16,800)
- Level 4 ($33,600): Direct Sales + MCLUB Membership combined
- 7 bonus types: Direct Referral (15%), Binary Matching (10-13%), Layer (30%), Leadership, Network Sight, Rank Differential, Global Profit Sharing
- 1 BV = $8 HKD
- Level 4 = Health + Wealth + Network = Complete Entrepreneur Ecosystem

---

### [Product 8: São Tomé & Príncipe Citizenship-by-Investment](./docs/products/08-sao-tome-citizenship-program.md)
Investment citizenship program for mainland Chinese clients — Non-CRS jurisdiction passport from $90,000 USD with Dubai residency bundle for global fund transfer strategy.

**Key Highlights:**
- Investment from **$90,000 USD** (donation) — 4 generations covered
- Non-CRS jurisdiction — no automatic financial information exchange
- No inheritance tax, no capital gains tax
- Approval in 2-3 months, no travel/interview required
- **Approval before donation** — safest payment model
- Dubai bundle: office space + entrepreneur visa + EID card
- CPLP rights (Portuguese-speaking countries residency/work/study)

---
